description:
This component is used in the Resonite hair dryer, and allows for dynamic bone colliders specified in the ``Colliders`` list to automatically collide with Dynamic Bone Chains. 

Can also be used in disabling the automatic dynamic bone colliders that Resonite generates incase you want to manually specify them.

fields.VisualizeColliders: Visualize all the colliders in ``Colliders`` that are currently colliding against a Dynamic Bone Chain. Automatically updates the collider visuals every frame server side.
fields.DisableDefaultHeadColliders: Whether to not use the default head collider made by the engine.
fields.DisableDefaultBodyColliders: Whether to not use the body colliders made by the engine.
fields.DisableDefaultLeftHandColliders: Whether to not use the left hand collider made by the engine.
fields.DisableDefaultRightHandColliders: Whether to not use the right hand collider made by the engine.
fields.Colliders: A list of colliders to enable collision for all Dynamic bone chains in a world.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: Only works while the component has an active user.
